---
title: Microblogs
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: render-microblogs
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis   # 👈 ensures markdown is rendered correctly

library(yaml)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

microblogs_df <- "data/microblogs.yml"

# read YAML and convert to data frame
posts <- yaml::read_yaml(microblogs_df) %>%
  purrr::map_dfr(as.list)

# sort by year (latest first)
posts <- arrange(posts, desc(posts$year))

# helper: extract URL from nested list (link$post)
get_url <- function(x) {
  if (is.character(x) && length(x) == 1 && nzchar(x)) return(x)

  if (is.list(x)) {
    if (!is.null(x$post) && is.character(x$post)) return(x$post[[1]])

    # fallback: take first usable value
    flat <- unlist(x)
    flat <- as.character(flat)
    flat <- flat[nzchar(flat)]
    if (length(flat) > 0) return(flat[[1]])
  }

  NULL
}

# print microblogs
for (i in seq_len(nrow(posts))) {

  title_i <- posts$title[i]
  year_i <- posts$year[i]
  desc_i <- posts$description[i]

  url_i <- get_url(posts$link[i])

  # ✨ emoji added here
  cat("### ✨ ", title_i, "\n\n")

  cat("📅 *", year_i, "*\n\n")

  cat(desc_i, "\n\n")

  if (!is.null(url_i)) {
    cat("🔗 [Read more](", url_i, "){target=\"_blank\"}\n\n")
  }

  cat("---\n\n")
}
```
